text.title: google-ads-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for google-ads-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the REST API directly instead of the Python client library for complex operations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The client library handles proto-plus marshaling, retry logic, and error code mapping automatically. Raw REST requires manual handling of all edge cases.
